tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def all-open-prs (github__list_pull_requests {:state "open"}))
(def filtered (filter #(and (> (:additions %) 400) (empty? (:closes_linear %))) all-open-prs))

;; Count per repository
(def per-repo (frequencies (map :repo filtered)))

;; Total count
(def total (count filtered))

;; PR with most additions
(def top-pr (apply max-key :additions filtered))
